description: An engineer needs to renew their state professional engineering license.

nodes.task_description: Identify the engineer by their license number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the engineer's license record.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the engineer has completed the required number of continuing education credits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the continuing education requirements have been met.

nodes.task_description: Process the renewal fee and update the license expiration date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent takes payment and successfully renews the license.
